title: briza media var. elatior
intro: Briza media var. elatior, also known as Greater Quaking Grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Briza media var. elatior, typically in the form of infusions or tinctures, are used to ease respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
